title: hub.toml
description: Per-device project and workflow configuration for hub.

project.description: Codebases to observe on this device.
A codebase and its associated workflows and environments.

environment.description: A deployment environment. Carries platform context shared by all its workflows.

env.description: Environment name — e.g. dev, uat, val, prod.

gcp_project.description: GCP project ID. Required by GCP-based workflows.

service.description: Service or app name within the platform.

workflow.description: A workflow instance. Entries are sorted alphabetically by workflow name slug.

workflow_errors_gcp.description: Surfaces errors from Google Cloud Logging. Reads gcp_project and service from parent environment. Credentials via GCP_TOKEN.

exclude_users.description: Exclude errors from these principals — e.g. bot service accounts.

workflow_errors_loki.description: Surfaces errors from Loki logs. Reads cluster from parent environment. Credentials via LOKI_TOKEN.

exclude_users.description: Exclude errors from these principals — e.g. bot service accounts.

workflow_github_issues.description: Surfaces open issues assigned to the authenticated user. Reads repo from parent project. Credentials via GITHUB_TOKEN.

assigned_only.description: When true, only surfaces issues assigned to the authenticated user. Default: false.

exclude_labels.description: Exclude issues carrying any of these labels — e.g. 'wontfix', 'duplicate'.

workflow_github_prs.description: Surfaces pull requests awaiting review. Reads repo from parent project. Credentials via GITHUB_TOKEN.

workflow_user_activity_gcp.description: Surfaces user activity from Google Cloud Logging. Reads gcp_project and service from parent environment. Credentials via GCP_TOKEN.

include_users.description: Only surface activity from these principals. When set, all others are ignored.

exclude_users.description: Exclude activity from these principals — e.g. bot service accounts.

workflow_user_activity_loki.description: Surfaces user activity from Loki logs. Reads cluster from parent environment. Credentials via LOKI_TOKEN.

include_users.description: Only surface activity from these principals. When set, all others are ignored.

exclude_users.description: Exclude activity from these principals — e.g. bot service accounts.

workflow_warnings_gcp.description: Surfaces warnings from Google Cloud Logging. Reads gcp_project and service from parent environment. Credentials via GCP_TOKEN.

exclude_users.description: Exclude warnings from these principals — e.g. bot service accounts.

workflow_warnings_loki.description: Surfaces warnings from Loki logs. Reads cluster from parent environment. Credentials via LOKI_TOKEN.

exclude_users.description: Exclude warnings from these principals — e.g. bot service accounts.

monitor.description: Non-project observations not tied to any codebase.
